CheckSubscription.name: CheckSubscription
CheckSubscription.description: Grants permission to check whether the account has access to given product

CreateCaseDraft.name: CreateCaseDraft
CreateCaseDraft.description: Grants permission to create or update case draft for the given case type

CreateContact.name: CreateContact
CreateContact.description: Grants permission to create an authenticated contact for the given contact type

DeleteCaseDraft.name: DeleteCaseDraft
DeleteCaseDraft.description: Grants permission to delete a case draft for the given case type

DescribeDynamicHelp.name: DescribeDynamicHelp
DescribeDynamicHelp.description: Grants permission to get dynamic help resources for given service and category

GetAccountGovCloudEnabled.name: GetAccountGovCloudEnabled
GetAccountGovCloudEnabled.description: Grants permission to determines whether the calling account is GovCloud enabled

GetAccountState.name: GetAccountState
GetAccountState.description: Grants permission to get the state of the calling account

GetBanner.name: GetBanner
GetBanner.description: Grants permission to get the support banner information

GetCaseDraft.name: GetCaseDraft
GetCaseDraft.description: Grants permission to get a case draft for given case type

GetIssueClassificationPredictions.name: GetIssueClassificationPredictions
GetIssueClassificationPredictions.description: Grants permission to get classification predictions of an issue

GetIssueTextSummary.name: GetIssueTextSummary
GetIssueTextSummary.description: Grants permission to get a generated text summary of an issue

GetQuestionnaire.name: GetQuestionnaire
GetQuestionnaire.description: Grants permission to get a feedback questionnaire

SaveFeedback.name: SaveFeedback
SaveFeedback.description: Grants permission to save questionnaire feedback
